name: Polpettone Di Tacchino (Turkey Roll)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the turkey breast and open it like a book.
2. Flatten with the blade of a large knife or meat mallet until it forms a large sheet.
3. Sprinkle with garlic, parsley, and salt and pepper on both sides. Set aside.
4. In a bowl, combine ground meat, bread crumbs, beaten egg, 2 tablespoons chicken broth, pistachios, half teaspoon salt, and a pinch of pepper.
5. Mix well.
6. Spread the mixture over the open turkey breast.
7. Roll up the turkey roll lengthwise, as you would for a jelly roll.
8. Tie securely with string.
9. In a skillet, place sage leaves, rosemary, and olive oil.
10. Brown the turkey roll on all sides.
11. Add white wine and raise the heat to allow alcohol to evaporate.
12. Add half cup of broth and simmer, tightly covered, for about two hours, turning once.
13. Remove string before slicing.
14. Serve with grapan juices strained over the slices.
